title: stachys lunata
intro: Stachys lunata, also known as the 'Moonlight Hedgehog', is a perennial plant species in the mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Stachys lunata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Stachys lunata are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for various health remedies.
